curation.synopsis: A lone traitor ship slips into the Sol system and is boarded by the Imperial Fists. Aboard, alive and unbound, is the most celebrated chronicler of the Great Crusade: Solomon Voss, the man whose books taught a generation of Imperial citizens to believe in the dream. Voss has spent the war at Horus Lupercal's side. He is brought to a fortress on Titan, where Rogal Dorn comes to question him, accompanied by the silent, watchful Knight-Errant Iacton Qruze. What follows is an argument as much as an interrogation — between a primarch who still wants to believe in enlightenment and a veteran who has decided that the Imperium will survive only by ruthlessness. Voss has been allowed home for one reason: to break Dorn. By the end, the matter will be settled with Qruze's sword.
